title: passovia rufa
intro: Passovia rufa, also known as Passiflora rufa, is a species of flowering plant in the passionflower family, native to South America. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include antispasmodic, sedative, and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Passovia rufa include reducing anxiety and insomnia, relieving muscle spasms, and promoting relaxation. Passovia rufa can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used to support sleep and relaxation.
